перефразируй
Celebrate Mother's Day In Style: 35 Best Hairstyles For Moms
Celebrate Mother's Day with these 35 stylish hairstyles for moms.

перефразируй
Mother's Day is right around the corner, and what's the best way to celebrate for your mom? If you are looking for a Mother's Day gift，consider giving your mom a whole new look. This is a wonderful gift idea to make her feel extra special.

With so many hairstyles to choose from, it can be challenging to decide which one would suit your mom's personality and style. To help you out, we have compiled a list of 35 Best Hairstyles for Mother's Day.

Mother's Day is approaching, and what better way to celebrate than by treating your mom to a new look? Giving your mom a fresh hairstyle can be a fantastic gift idea that will make her feel truly special.

Choosing the perfect hairstyle for your mom's personality and style can be a tough task with so many options available. To make things easier for you, we have put together a list of 35 fabulous hairstyles for Mother's Day.

перефразируй
Pixie Cut
Short Cropped Hairstyle

перефразируй
This is a classic hairstyle that works well for women of all ages. A pixie cut is a short, cropped hairstyle that typically features longer layers on top and shorter layers on the sides and back. It's a popular choice for moms who want a low-maintenance haircut that still looks stylish and feminine. There are many variations of the pixie cut, including the classic pixie, which features short, choppy layers all over the head, and the undercut pixie, which features shaved sides or an undercut underneath the longer top layers. Pixie cuts are often styled with texture or volume to add interest and dimension to the hair.\

This timeless hairstyle is suitable for women of all age groups. The pixie cut is a short hairstyle with longer layers on top and shorter layers on the sides and back. It is a favored style among mothers who desire a chic and easy-to-maintain haircut. The pixie cut offers various interpretations, such as the classic pixie with short, choppy layers throughout the head and the undercut pixie with shaved sides or an undercut beneath the longer top layers. Pixie cuts are commonly styled with texture or volume for added depth and appeal to the hair.

перефразируй
Bob Haircut
Short Hairstyle

перефразируй
Bob haircut works great for women who want a sophisticated look. To achieve a bob haircut for short hair, the hair should be cut to a length between the chin and the shoulders. The ends should be bluntly cut straight across, or slightly angled towards the front to create a more flattering shape around the face. There are also many variations of this hairstyle, such as the layered bob or the asymmetrical bob, which can add more texture to your hair to show movement.

The bob hairstyle is perfect for women seeking an elegant appearance. To achieve a short bob haircut, the hair is cut to a length ranging from the chin to the shoulders. The ends can be cut bluntly straight across or angled slightly towards the front to create a flattering shape around the face. There are numerous versions of this hairstyle, such as the layered bob or the asymmetrical bob, which can introduce texture to the hair to enhance its fluidity.

перефразируй
Shaggy Bob
Messy Bob

перефразируй
A popular variation of the classic bob that provides a modern look. This hairstyle suits moms who want to add some texture and volume to their hair. To achieve a voluminous bob, hair should be cut to a length between the chin and shoulders and add lots of layers and texture throughout. The ends of hair should be left slightly rough and uneven to get a more tousled, lived-in look. Layers can be cut to different lengths to add movement and dimension to the hair. Overall, a shaggy bob is a versatile and trendy option for those with short hair.

The Shaggy Bob is a trendy twist on the traditional bob hairstyle, offering a contemporary appearance. Ideal for mothers seeking to enhance their hair with texture and volume, this style involves cutting the hair to a length between the chin and shoulders and incorporating numerous layers and texture throughout. The ends are left slightly irregular and uneven to achieve a disheveled, effortless look. Varying lengths of layers are added to create movement and depth in the hair. Ultimately, the Shaggy Bob is a versatile and stylish choice for individuals with short hair.

перефразируй
Layered Bob
Bob with Layers

перефразируй
A layered bob is a haircut that's both fashionable and functional. This hairstyle features short to medium-length hair that's cut into layers, with the top layers being shorter than the bottom layers. The result is a hairstyle that has plenty of movement, texture, and volume, making it perfect for anyone who wants a low-maintenance yet stylish look. The layered bob is versatile enough to work well on different face shapes and hair textures, and it can be customized with various fringe styles or by adding highlights or lowlights.

The layered bob is a stylish and practical haircut option. It involves cutting short to medium-length hair into layers, with shorter layers at the top than at the bottom. This results in a hairstyle with ample movement, texture, and volume, ideal for those seeking a chic yet easy-to-maintain look. The layered bob is adaptable to various face shapes and hair textures and can be personalized with different fringe styles, highlights, or lowlights.

перефразируй
Blunt Bob
Straight Bob

перефразируй
Blunt bob is a haircut that features a straight cut across the ends of the hair, giving it a sharp and defined look. To achieve this hairstyle, hair should be cut to a length between the chin and the shoulders, with the ends of the hair cut straight or slightly angled towards your face. The result is a hairstyle that's versatile, flattering, and easy to maintain. Blunt bobs are perfect for anyone who wants a chic yet simple look. The blunt bob is a sleek and sophisticated hairstyle that looks great on women of all ages. For moms who want a more polished look, this style is perfect.

The blunt bob haircut is characterized by having straight-cut ends, creating a sharp and distinct appearance. To achieve this style, the hair is typically cut to a length between the chin and shoulders, with the ends either being cut straight across or angled slightly towards the face. This results in a versatile, flattering, and low-maintenance hairstyle that is perfect for those desiring a sleek and effortless look. The blunt bob exudes a sophisticated and polished vibe that suits women of all ages, making it an ideal choice for moms seeking a more refined appearance.

перефразируй
Lob Haircut
Long Bob Haircut

перефразируй
A lob haircut, short for "long bob," is a trendy hairstyle that falls just above the shoulders. To achieve this look, the hair is typically cut bluntly around the shoulders or collarbone, with subtle layering for movement and texture. The result is a hairstyle that's flattering, modern, and easy to style. Lobs are perfect for anyone who wants a fresh and trendy look without sacrificing too much length, and they can be customized with different textures, colors, and parting styles. A long bob that suits moms who want a trendy yet easy-to-maintain haircut.

The lob haircut, which is short for "long bob," is a stylish hairstyle that reaches just above the shoulders. This look is typically achieved by cutting the hair bluntly around the shoulders or collarbone, incorporating gentle layering for added movement and texture. The outcome is a flattering, contemporary, and easy-to-style hairstyle. Lobs are ideal for individuals seeking a chic and modern appearance without compromising on length, and they can be personalized with various textures, colors, and parting techniques. A long bob is a fashionable and low-maintenance haircut option that is perfect for moms who desire a trendy yet easy-to-manage style.

перефразируй
Shag Haircut
Shaggy Hairstyle

перефразируй
The shag haircut is a retro-inspired hairstyle that's back in fashion. To achieve this look, hair is layered at various lengths, with choppy or feathered ends and lots of texture. The result is a hairstyle that's effortless, bohemian, and full of movement. Shags are perfect for anyone who wants a relaxed yet stylish look and can be customized with different fringe styles, layers, and hair colors. It's also a low-maintenance and versatile style that works for moms of all ages. This hairstyle is perfect for busy moms.

The shag haircut is a vintage-inspired style that has made a comeback. This look involves layering the hair at different lengths, creating choppy or feathered ends and adding plenty of texture. The outcome is an easygoing, bohemian hairstyle that exudes movement. Shags are an excellent choice for individuals seeking a laid-back yet fashionable appearance, and they can be tailored with various fringe styles, layers, and hair colors. This low-maintenance and adaptable hairstyle suits mothers of all ages and is particularly suited for busy moms.

перефразируй
Layered Haircut
Haircut with Layers

перефразируй
A timeless option that provides a flattering look. Layers work well with thick and curly hair and add texture and interest to the hair. A layered haircut is a hairstyle in which the hair is cut into multiple layers, with longer layers on top and shorter layers underneath. This creates a textured and voluminous look. The layers can be cut in different lengths and angles to achieve various types of layering, such as feathered layers or choppy layers. They are especially popular for medium-length hair, as they add movement and dimension to the hair without sacrificing too much length.

A classic choice that enhances one's appearance. Layers are ideal for thick and curly hair, providing texture and dimension. A layered haircut involves cutting the hair into multiple layers, typically longer ones on top and shorter ones underneath, resulting in a voluminous and textured appearance. The layers can be tailored to different lengths and angles to create various styles, such as feathered or choppy layers. Particularly favored for medium-length hair, layered cuts offer movement and depth without compromising on length.

перефразируй
Angled Bob
Asymmetrical Bob

перефразируй
An angled bob is a type of bob haircut that features longer hair in the front and shorter hair in the back. The hairstyle typically has a sharp angle on the one side where the hair transitions from long to short, creating a edgy look. This stylish haircut suits moms who want a more modern look. It features a shorter back and longer front that adds some dimension to the face. The angled bob is a versatile hairstyle that can be customized to suit different face shapes and hair textures. It's a popular choice for women who want a low-maintenance haircut that still looks chic and stylish.

A bob with an angle is a variation of the bob haircut where the hair is longer in the front and shorter in the back. This style usually includes a sharp slope on one side where the hair shifts from long to short, producing a trendy appearance. This fashionable hairstyle is perfect for mothers seeking a contemporary look, featuring a shorter back and longer front that adds dimension to the face. The angled bob is adaptable and can be tailored to complement various face shapes and hair types. It is a favored option for women desiring a stylish and low-maintenance haircut.

перефразируй
Wavy Hairstyle
Hairstyle with Waves

перефразируй
A wavy hairstyle is a hairstyle with soft, natural-looking waves in the hair. It's a versatile hairstyle that can be achieved with different hair lengths and textures. Wavy hairstyles add movement, volume, and texture to the hair, creating a romantic and effortless look. One way to get wavy hairstyles is to use a curling iron or wand to get loose waves throughout the hair. Another way is to apply mousse to damp hair and scrunch it with your fingers, then let your hair air dry.

A hairstyle featuring gentle, natural-looking waves in the hair is known as a wavy hairstyle. This versatile style can be adapted to various hair lengths and textures. Wavy hairstyles introduce movement, volume, and texture to the hair, resulting in a romantic and effortless appearance. Achieving wavy hairstyles can be done by using a curling iron or wand to create loose waves, or by applying mousse to damp hair, scrunching it with your fingers, and allowing it to air dry.

перефразируй
Layered haircut
Haircut with different lengths of hair throughout

перефразируй
A layered haircut for long hair is a great way to add movement and dimension to your locks. This hairstyle involves cutting the hair in layers of different lengths, which creates depth and texture. When getting a layered haircut, it's important to determine the best type of layers to suit your face shape and hair type. Layers in the crown encourage volume. It works well with both wavy and straight hair. A layered haircut is a versatile and low-maintenance style that can give long hair a fresh new look. This hairstyle suits moms who want to keep their length but add some interest to their hair.

Adding movement and dimension to long hair can be achieved with a layered haircut, making it an excellent choice. This style consists of cutting the hair into layers of varying lengths, which generates depth and texture. When opting for a layered haircut, it is crucial to select the appropriate type of layers that complement your face shape and hair type. Crown layers enhance volume and are suitable for both wavy and straight hair. A layered haircut is a versatile and easy-to-manage style that can rejuvenate long hair with a fresh appearance, making it perfect for mothers desiring to retain their length while incorporating added interest to their hair.

перефразируй
Beach Waves
Waves reminiscent of a day at the beach
на русском
Волны, напоминающие о дне на пляже

перефразируй
Beach waves are a popular hairstyle that mimics the natural, tousled look of hair after a day spent at the beach. This hairstyle is achieved by creating loose, textured waves throughout the hair that appear effortless and carefree. To get beach waves, you can start by washing your hair with a texturizing shampoo and the specialized conditioner. Then, apply a sea salt spray or texture spray to damp hair and encourage wave formation. Next, use a diffuser attachment on your blow dryer to dry your hair. This hairstyle suits moms who want to embrace their natural texture without much effort.

Пляжные волны — популярная прическа, имитирующая естественный, легко-брошеный вид волос после дня на пляже. Эта прическа достигается путем создания свободных, текстурированных волн по всей длине волос, которые кажутся небрежными и беззаботными. Чтобы создать пляжные волны, можно начать с мытья волос специальным шампунем для создания текстуры и соответствующим кондиционером. Затем нанесите спрей с морской солью или текстурный спрей на влажные волосы, стимулируя образование волн. Затем воспользуйтесь насадкой-диффузором на фене для сушки волос. Эта прическа подойдет мамам, которые хотят выразить свою естественную текстуру волос с минимальными усилиями.
по английски

Beach waves are a popular hairstyle that replicates the natural, tousled look of hair after a day spent at the beach. This style is achieved by creating loose, textured waves throughout the hair that give an effortless and carefree appearance. To achieve beach waves, you can start by washing your hair with a texturizing shampoo and conditioner. Then, apply a sea salt spray or texture spray to damp hair to encourage wave formation. Finally, use a diffuser attachment on your blow dryer to dry your hair. This hairstyle is perfect for moms who want to enhance their natural hair texture with minimal effort.

перефразируй
Half-Up Half-Down Hairstyle
Half of the Hair Pulled Up and Half Down

перефразируй
This hairstyle is a versatile look that can be achieved by dividing the hair into two equal sections with a central part. Next, take a small section of hair from above each ear and tie them together at the back of the head using an elastic band. The remaining loose hair can be styled as desired, whether straightened, curled, or waved, to add texture and dimension. This simple yet elegant hairstyle can be worn for both casual and formal occasions, making it a go-to option for most moms.

An adaptable hairstyle that involves splitting the hair into two equal sections with a middle part. Then, gather a small section of hair from above each ear and secure them together at the back of the head with an elastic band. The remaining loose hair can be styled in various ways, such as straightened, curled, or waved, to enhance texture and depth. This effortless yet stylish hairstyle is suitable for both casual and formal events, making it a convenient choice for many moms.

перефразируй
Braided Hairstyle
Hairstyle with Braids

перефразируй
Braided hairstyles involve weaving hair into intricate patterns to get a unique look. There are many types of braids to choose from, including French braids, Dutch braids, fishtail braids, etc. Braided hairstyles can be used for a variety of occasions, including weddings, proms, or even just everyday wear. They offer a stylish manner to keep your hair out of your face while still looking complete. Whether it's a simple side braid or a complex fishtail braid, this hairstyle adds some interest to long hair. This style suits moms who want an intricate hairstyle.

Intricate patterns are woven into the hair to create unique braided hairstyles. Various options such as French braids, Dutch braids, fishtail braids, and more can be chosen. Braided hairstyles are versatile and can be suitable for different events like weddings, proms, or everyday wear. They provide a fashionable way to keep the hair away from the face while maintaining an elegant appearance. Whether it's a straightforward side braid or a more intricate fishtail braid, this hairstyle adds an element of interest to long hair, making it a great choice for moms desiring a more elaborate hairdo.

перефразируй
Loose Curls
Soft Waves

перефразируй
If your mom loves voluminous and wavy hair, then she need to try loose curls. The style involves creating large, soft curls that are not tightly wound or defined. To achieve loose curls, you can use a curling iron with a large barrel size. Start by dividing your hair into sections and then wrap each section around the curling iron, leaving the ends out for a more natural look. Hold the hair in place for a few seconds before releasing it to create the loose curls. Loose curls are perfect for any occasion. It suits moms who want to have a relaxed look.

If your mother enjoys having full-bodied and wavy hair, she should consider trying loose curls. This hairstyle consists of forming large, gentle curls that are not tightly coiled or defined. To achieve loose curls, utilize a curling iron with a larger barrel size. Begin by sectioning your hair and wrapping each part around the curling iron, leaving the ends out for a more natural appearance. Keep the hair in place for a few seconds before releasing it to produce the loose curls. Loose curls are versatile for any event and are ideal for mothers seeking a laid-back look.

перефразируй
Classic Chignon
Traditional Bun

перефразируй
The classic chignon is a sophisticated updo that works well for formal occasions. It typically involves gathering all of your hair at the nape of your neck and twisting it in a tight bun. The style can be secured with bobby pins, and any loose hairs can be smoothed down with hairspray or gel. This hairstyle is graceful, making it perfect for weddings, proms, and other special events. With some practice, you can easily master the classic chignon for your next formal event. This hairstyle suits moms who want a dignified look.

The traditional chignon is an elegant updo that is ideal for formal events. It usually requires pulling all your hair to the base of your neck and twisting it into a neat bun. The bun can be fastened with bobby pins, and any stray hairs can be tamed with hairspray or gel. This refined hairstyle exudes grace, making it suitable for weddings, proms, and other special occasions. With a bit of practice, mastering the classic chignon for your next formal event can be effortless. This hairstyle is perfect for mothers seeking a sophisticated appearance.

перефразируй
The messy bun is a laid-back and popular hairstyle that is commonly worn by women. This style involves gathering the hair back at the top of your head, securing it with a hair tie to make a loose ponytail, and then twisting the hair into a bun. The key to achieving this look is to leave some strands of hair loose to get an effortless, undone appearance. You can also tease the hair near the top of your head for added volume and texture. The final result is a casual, comfortable hairstyle that can be worn on any occasion.

The casual bun is a relaxed and trendy hairstyle frequently sported by women. This look entails pulling the hair back towards the crown of the head, tying it with a hair elastic to form a loose ponytail, and then twisting the hair into a bun. To achieve this style successfully, it is essential to leave some strands of hair free for that effortless, slightly disheveled look. You can also tease the hair near the crown area to increase volume and texture. The end result is a laid-back, easygoing hairstyle that is suitable for any occasion.

перефразируй
This style gives an aura of sophistication and class, making it perfect for formal occasions. To create the French twist, gather your hair at the nape of your neck and twist it upwards towards the crown of your head, securing it with bobby pins. Next, tuck the ends of your hair into the twist. To give the twist a smooth finish, you should remove any bumps or flyaways. Finally, apply some hairspray. French twist can add elegance to any outfit. Whether you're attending a wedding or a gala, this updo is sure to make you feel glamorous.

Exuding an air of elegance and refinement, this style is ideal for formal events. To achieve the French twist, gather your hair at the nape of your neck and twist it upwards towards the crown, securing it with bobby pins. Then, tuck the ends of your hair into the twist and smooth out any bumps or stray strands for a polished look. Finish with a spritz of hairspray. The French twist can elevate any attire, whether you are attending a wedding or a gala, ensuring you feel glamorous and sophisticated.

перефразируй
The Half-Up Top Knot is an effortless hairstyle that involves pulling the top section of your hair into a high ponytail and twisting it tightly to form a bun on the crown of your head. You can use bobby pins to secure the bun in place and hide the ends of your hair underneath it. This style works well for when you want to look stylish without spending too much time on your hair, and it keeps your hair off your face. To enhance the overall look, you can add some texture to the bottom half of your hair.

The Half-Up Top Knot is a simple hairstyle where the top portion of your hair is gathered into a high ponytail and twisted tightly to create a bun at the top of your head. Secure the bun in place with bobby pins and tuck the ends of your hair beneath it. This hairstyle is perfect for achieving a chic look without dedicating much time to styling, and it helps to keep your hair away from your face. For added appeal, consider adding some texture to the lower half of your hair.

перефразируй
If your mom is looking for a unique updo, then the side updo is a fantastic option. The hair is gathered to one side of the head and styled into an elegant bun or twist. This versatile hairstyle can be worn for many different occasions. To obtain a side updo, start by brushing your hair thoroughly to remove any tangles or knots. Then, gather all your hair to one side of your head and twist it into a bun. Secure the bun in place. The side updo is perfect for moms who want an elegant hairstyle without too much fuss.

For a distinctive updo that your mom may appreciate, consider the side updo as a wonderful choice. This hairstyle involves gathering the hair to one side of the head and creating an elegant bun or twist. This versatile updo is suitable for various occasions. To achieve a side updo, begin by thoroughly brushing your hair to eliminate any knots or tangles. Next, collect all of your hair to one side of the head and twist it into a bun, securing it in place. The side updo is ideal for mothers seeking a sophisticated hairstyle with minimal effort.

перефразируй
Balayage is a hair coloring technique where the color is applied freehand in sweeping motions onto the hair, creating a graduated, natural-looking effect. With balayage, the colorist focuses on painting the color onto the surface of the hair strands rather than saturating the entire section of hair. This creates a more natural-looking highlight or lowlight that seamlessly blends with the rest of the hair.

Balayage is a hair coloring method that involves applying color by hand in sweeping motions onto the hair, resulting in a gradual, natural-looking transition. When using balayage, the emphasis is on painting the color onto the outer layer of the hair strands rather than saturating the entire section. This technique produces a more organic highlight or lowlight that effortlessly blends with the surrounding hair.

перефразируй
It is a technique where the hair gradually transitions from one color to another, typically from dark at the roots to lighter towards the ends. Ombré can be done with natural colors, such as brown to blonde, or with more vibrant colors, such as pink to purple. Unlike balayage, which focuses on creating a natural-looking effect, ombré is designed to create a noticeable contrast between the darker roots and lighter ends.

Ombré is a method in which the hair transitions gradually from one hue to another, often shifting from dark tones at the roots to lighter shades at the tips. This style can involve neutral tones like brown to blonde or bolder color combinations such as pink to purple. In contrast to balayage, which aims for a more subtle, natural appearance, ombré is intended to produce a distinct contrast between the darker roots and the lighter ends.

перефразируй
Highlights are a technique where small sections of hair are lightened to add dimension and contrast. This is typically done by applying bleach or hair color to small sections of hair using foils or other methods to separate the highlighted hair from the rest of the hair. The result is a brighter, lighter color that adds depth and movement to the hair. They can be subtle and natural-looking or more dramatic and bold depending on the desired effect. Highlights can be applied all over the head or in specific areas such as around the face or on the ends of the hair.

Highlighting is a method in which small portions of hair are lightened to create depth and contrast. This process usually involves using bleach or hair dye on specific sections of hair, utilizing foils or other techniques to separate the highlighted portions from the rest of the hair. The outcome is a lighter, more luminous hue that enhances the hair's texture and movement. Highlights can range from subtle and understated to bold and eye-catching, depending on the desired outcome. They can be applied throughout the entire head or strategically placed in areas like around the face or on the hair tips.

перефразируй
Lowlights are a technique that involves adding darker shades to the hair to add depth and dimension. This is typically done by applying hair color or dye to small sections of hair to create contrast against lighter strands. Lowlights can be used to add richness and depth to natural hair color, or to balance out highlights by adding darker tones. They can be used to add a subtle effect or a more dramatic one, depending on the desired look. They are often applied in combination with highlights to achieve a multidimensional look.

Lowlights are a method in which darker hues are incorporated into the hair to introduce depth and dimension. This technique commonly entails applying hair dye or color to select sections of the hair to create a contrast with lighter strands. Lowlights serve to enrich and enhance the natural hair color or harmonize highlights by introducing darker tones. They can deliver a subtle or striking effect, depending on the intended aesthetic. Lowlights are frequently used in conjunction with highlights to achieve a multi-layered appearance.

перефразируй
It is a technique where hair dye or color is applied to the entire head of hair to achieve a consistent, uniform color. This can be done with permanent, semi-permanent, or temporary hair dyes, depending on how long-lasting the desired color change should be. All-over color can be used to enhance natural hair color, cover gray hair, or completely transform the hair color. It can be done in a range of shades, from natural-looking colors to more vibrant shades.

This method involves applying hair dye or color to the entire head of hair to achieve a unified, even tone. The choice between permanent, semi-permanent, or temporary hair dyes depends on the desired duration of the color change. Full-color application can enhance the natural hair hue, conceal gray strands, or completely alter the hair color. It offers a spectrum of shades, from subtle, natural tones to bold, vibrant hues.

перефразируй
A thin, braided headband can be worn with your hair down and wavy for a bohemian look.

A thick, embellished headband can be worn with a low bun or chignon for a formal occasion.

A sporty headband can be worn with a high ponytail or messy coiffure for a casual look.

A slim braided headband can be paired with loose, wavy hair to achieve a bohemian style.

A thick, adorned headband complements a low bun or chignon for a formal event.

A sporty headband complements a high ponytail or tousled hairstyle for a casual appearance.

перефразируй
Use a barrette to clip back one side of your hair for a half-up style.

Get a side-swept look by clipping your hair behind one ear with a decorative hair clip.

Use several small hair clips to achieve a fun, rebellious look all over your head.

Secure one side of your hair in a half-up style using a barrette.

Create a side-swept appearance by fastening your hair behind one ear with an ornamental hair clip.

Add multiple small hair clips throughout your hair to create a playful and daring look.

перефразируй
Pull your hair into a ponytail and secure it with a hair claw to add a romantic feel.

Do a messy coiffure by gathering your hair into a loose knot and securing it with a hair claw.

Section off the top half of your hair and make a small bun at the crown of your head, securing it with a hair claw.

Tie your hair into a ponytail and use a hair claw to create a romantic vibe.

Achieve a tousled hairstyle by creating a loose knot with your hair and securing it with a hair claw.

Part the top section of your hair and twist it into a tiny bun at the top of your head, securing it with a hair claw.

перефразируй
Use a single barrette to hold back one side of your hair for a simple yet elegant look.

Clip several barrettes in a row along one side of your head for a fun, playful look.

Use a jeweled barrette to add some sparkle to an updo, such as a French twist or chignon.

Secure one side of your hair with a solitary barrette to achieve an effortless yet classy appearance.

Arrange multiple barrettes in a line along one side of your head to create a lively and spirited style.

Incorporate a gem-adorned barrette to infuse some sparkle into an updo like a French twist or chignon.

перефразируй
Gather your hair into a ponytail and secure it with a colorful hair tie for a fun, youthful look.

Use several hair ties to do a braided hairstyle, such as a fishtail or Dutch braid.

Twist two sections of hair together and secure them with a hair tie at the ends for a quick and easy half-tucked style.
